title: clarkia tembloriensis subsp. tembloriensis
intro: Clarkia tembloriensis subsp. tembloriensis, also known as the Temblor Clarkia, is a rare and endangered annual plant species native to the California Central Coast in the United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clarkia tembloriensis subsp. tembloriensis include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared through infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
